001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.entity;
002
003import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
004import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
005import androidx.room.Entity;
006import androidx.room.ForeignKey;
007import androidx.room.Index;
008import androidx.room.PrimaryKey;
009import java.time.Instant;
010
011@Entity(
012    tableName = "export_history",
013    indices = {
014        @Index(value = "project_id"),
015        @Index(value = {"project_id", "exported_at"})
016    },
017    foreignKeys = {
018        @ForeignKey(
019            entity = Project.class,
020            parentColumns = "project_id",
021            childColumns = "project_id",
022            onDelete = ForeignKey.CASCADE
023        )
024    }
025)
026public class ExportHistory {
027
028  @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true)
029  @ColumnInfo(name = "export_history_id")
030  private long id;
031
032  @ColumnInfo(name = "project_id")
033  private long projectId;
034
035  @NonNull
036  @ColumnInfo(name = "file_name")
037  private String fileName = "";
038
039  @NonNull
040  @ColumnInfo(name = "file_path")
041  private String filePath = "";
042
043  @NonNull
044  @ColumnInfo(name = "file_format")
045  private String fileFormat = "";
046
047  @ColumnInfo(name = "resolution")
048  private int resolution;
049
050  @ColumnInfo(name = "scale_factor")
051  private int scaleFactor;
052
053  @NonNull
054  @ColumnInfo(name = "exported_at")
055  private Instant exportedAt = Instant.now();
056
057  @ColumnInfo(name = "file_size_bytes")
058  private int fileSizeBytes;
059
060  public long getId() {
061    return id;
062  }
063
064  public void setId(long id) {
065    this.id = id;
066  }
067
068  public long getProjectId() {
069    return projectId;
070  }
071
072  public void setProjectId(long projectId) {
073    this.projectId = projectId;
074  }
075
076  @NonNull
077  public String getFileName() {
078    return fileName;
079  }
080
081  public void setFileName(@NonNull String fileName) {
082    this.fileName = fileName;
083  }
084
085  @NonNull
086  public String getFilePath() {
087    return filePath;
088  }
089
090  public void setFilePath(@NonNull String filePath) {
091    this.filePath = filePath;
092  }
093
094  @NonNull
095  public String getFileFormat() {
096    return fileFormat;
097  }
098
099  public void setFileFormat(@NonNull String fileFormat) {
100    this.fileFormat = fileFormat;
101  }
102
103  public int getResolution() {
104    return resolution;
105  }
106
107  public void setResolution(int resolution) {
108    this.resolution = resolution;
109  }
110
111  public int getScaleFactor() {
112    return scaleFactor;
113  }
114
115  public void setScaleFactor(int scaleFactor) {
116    this.scaleFactor = scaleFactor;
117  }
118
119  @NonNull
120  public Instant getExportedAt() {
121    return exportedAt;
122  }
123
124  public void setExportedAt(@NonNull Instant exportedAt) {
125    this.exportedAt = exportedAt;
126  }
127
128  public int getFileSizeBytes() {
129    return fileSizeBytes;
130  }
131
132  public void setFileSizeBytes(int fileSizeBytes) {
133    this.fileSizeBytes = fileSizeBytes;
134  }
135}
